title: [InstCombine] Narrow umin/umax/smin/smax through trunc.
author: fhahn
description:
Update EvaluateInDifferentType / canEvaluateTruncated to support
narrowing umin/umax/smin/smax intrinsics, when their result fits in the
narrow type: zero high bits for umin/umax, or enough sign
bits for smin/smax.

Alive2 Proofs:
 * umin/umax with high bits zero: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/dJC_Fj
 * smin/smax with sign-bits set: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/z7vM8Z

tests.test_body:
define i8 @smax_add_two_sexts(i8 %x, i8 %y) {
  %sx = sext i8 %x to i32
  %sy = sext i8 %y to i32
  %add = add nsw i32 %sx, %sy
  %u = call i32 @llvm.smax.i32(i32 %add, i32 -100)
  %t = trunc i32 %u to i8
  ret i8 %t
}

; Function Attrs: nocallback nocreateundeforpoison nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare i32 @llvm.smax.i32(i32, i32) #0

attributes #0 = { nocallback nocreateundeforpoison nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none) }

define i8 @umin_shared_subexpr(i8 %x) {
  %z = zext i8 %x to i32
  %a = mul nuw nsw i32 %z, 3
  %b = add nuw nsw i32 %z, 50
  %u = call i32 @llvm.umin.i32(i32 %a, i32 %b)
  %t = trunc i32 %u to i8
  ret i8 %t
}

; Function Attrs: nocallback nocreateundeforpoison nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare i32 @llvm.umin.i32(i32, i32) #0

attributes #0 = { nocallback nocreateundeforpoison nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none) }

define i8 @umax_add_two_zexts(i8 %x, i8 %y) {
  %zx = zext i8 %x to i32
  %zy = zext i8 %y to i32
  %add = add nuw i32 %zx, %zy
  %u = call i32 @llvm.umax.i32(i32 %add, i32 50)
  %t = trunc i32 %u to i8
  ret i8 %t
}

; Function Attrs: nocallback nocreateundeforpoison nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare i32 @llvm.umax.i32(i32, i32) #0

define <4 x i8> @umin_or_two_zexts_vec(<4 x i8> %x, <4 x i8> %y) {
  %zx = zext <4 x i8> %x to <4 x i32>
  %zy = zext <4 x i8> %y to <4 x i32>
  %or = or <4 x i32> %zx, %zy
  %u = call <4 x i32> @llvm.umin.v4i32(<4 x i32> %or, <4 x i32> splat (i32 100))
  %t = trunc <4 x i32> %u to <4 x i8>
  ret <4 x i8> %t
}

  %sy = sext i8 %y to i32

define <4 x i8> @smax_xor_two_sexts_vec(<4 x i8> %x, <4 x i8> %y) {
  %sx = sext <4 x i8> %x to <4 x i32>
  %sy = sext <4 x i8> %y to <4 x i32>
  %xor = xor <4 x i32> %sx, %sy
  %u = call <4 x i32> @llvm.smax.v4i32(<4 x i32> %xor, <4 x i32> splat (i32 -50))
  %t = trunc <4 x i32> %u to <4 x i8>

define i8 @umin_or_known_high_bit(i8 %x, i32 %y) {
  %z = zext i8 %x to i32
  %or = or i32 %z, 256
  %a = and i32 %y, 511
  %u = call i32 @llvm.umin.i32(i32 %or, i32 %a)
  %t = trunc i32 %u to i8
  ret i8 %t
}

; Function Attrs: nocallback nocreateundeforpoison nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare i32 @llvm.umin.i32(i32, i32) #0

attributes #0 = { nocallback nocreateundeforpoison nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none) }

define <4 x i8> @smin_phi_self_loop_vec(i1 %c, <4 x i8> %x) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %loop, %entry
  %acc = phi <4 x i32> [ splat (i32 127), %entry ], [ %m, %loop ]
  %a = and <4 x i32> %acc, splat (i32 127)
  %ext = sext <4 x i8> %x to <4 x i32>
  %m = call <4 x i32> @llvm.smin.v4i32(<4 x i32> %a, <4 x i32> %ext)
  br i1 %c, label %exit, label %loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop
  %t = trunc <4 x i32> %m to <4 x i8>
  ret <4 x i8> %t
}

  %m = call i32 @llvm.smin.i32(i32 %a, i32 %ext)

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop

  %u2 = call i32 @llvm.smax.i32(i32 %u1, i32 -100)

attributes #0 = { nocallback nocreateundeforpoison nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none) }

target triple = "arm64-apple-macosx"

define void @mul3_clamp_u8_select(ptr noalias %out, ptr noalias %in) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %loop, %entry
  %i = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %inc, %loop ]
  %pi = getelementptr inbounds i8, ptr %in, i64 %i
  %vi = load i8, ptr %pi, align 1
  %z = zext i8 %vi to i32
  %m = mul nuw nsw i32 %z, 3
  %cmp = icmp ugt i32 %m, 255
  %sel = select i1 %cmp, i32 255, i32 %m
  %t = trunc i32 %sel to i8
  %po = getelementptr inbounds i8, ptr %out, i64 %i
  store i8 %t, ptr %po, align 1
  %inc = add nuw i64 %i, 1
  %ex = icmp eq i64 %inc, 1000
  br i1 %ex, label %exit, label %loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop
  ret void
}

comments.author: llvmorg-github-actions[bot]
comments.body:
<!--LLVM PR SUMMARY COMMENT-->

@llvm/pr-subscribers-llvm-transforms

Author: Florian Hahn (fhahn)

<details>
<summary>Changes</summary>

Update EvaluateInDifferentType / canEvaluateTruncated to support
narrowing umin/umax/smin/smax intrinsics, when their result fits in the
narrow type: zero high bits for umin/umax, or enough sign
bits for smin/smax.

Alive2 Proofs:
 * umin/umax with high bits zero: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/dJC_Fj
 * smin/smax with sign-bits set: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/z7vM8Z

---

Patch is 27.99 KiB, truncated to 20.00 KiB below, full version: https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/199213.diff


3 Files Affected:

- (modified) llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineCasts.cpp (+36) 
- (added) llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/trunc-minmax-intrinsics.ll (+623) 
- (added) llvm/test/Transforms/PhaseOrdering/AArch64/trunc-intrinsics.ll (+63) 


``````````diff
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineCasts.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineCasts.cpp
index 05508d84c036b..6ec7d4c2e70fe 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineCasts.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineCasts.cpp
@@ -122,6 +122,19 @@ static Value *EvaluateInDifferentTypeImpl(Value *V, Type *Ty, bool isSigned,
         Res = CallInst::Create(Fn->getFunctionType(), Fn);
         break;
       }
+      case Intrinsic::umin:
+      case Intrinsic::umax:
+      case Intrinsic::smin:
+      case Intrinsic::smax: {
+        Value *Op0 = EvaluateInDifferentTypeImpl(II->getArgOperand(0), Ty,
+                                                 isSigned, IC, Processed);
+        Value *Op1 = EvaluateInDifferentTypeImpl(II->getArgOperand(1), Ty,
+                                                 isSigned, IC, Processed);
+        Function *Fn = Intrinsic::getOrInsertDeclaration(
+            I->getModule(), II->getIntrinsicID(), {Ty});
+        Res = CallInst::Create(Fn->getFunctionType(), Fn, {Op0, Op1});
+        break;
+      }
       }
     }
     break;
@@ -607,6 +620,29 @@ bool TypeEvaluationHelper::canEvaluateTruncatedPred(Value *V, Type *Ty,
     return canEvaluateTruncatedImpl(I->getOperand(0), Ty, IC, CxtI) &&
            canEvaluateTruncatedImpl(I->getOperand(1), Ty, IC, CxtI);
 
+  case Instruction::Call: {
+    auto *MM = dyn_cast<MinMaxIntrinsic>(I);
+    if (!MM)
+      return false;
+    // The min/max can be performed in the narrow type when each operand has
+    // zero high bits (for umin/umax) or enough sign bits (for smin/smax).
+    Value *Op0 = MM->getLHS();
+    Value *Op1 = MM->getRHS();
+    uint32_t BitWidth = Ty->getScalarSizeInBits();
+    if (MM->isSigned()) {
+      if (IC.ComputeMaxSignificantBits(Op0, CxtI) > BitWidth ||
+          IC.ComputeMaxSignificantBits(Op1, CxtI) > BitWidth)
+        break;
+    } else {
+      APInt Mask =
+          APInt::getBitsSetFrom(OrigTy->getScalarSizeInBits(), BitWidth);
+      if (!IC.MaskedValueIsZero(Op0, Mask, CxtI) ||
+          !IC.MaskedValueIsZero(Op1, Mask, CxtI))
+        break;
+    }
+    return canEvaluateTruncatedImpl(Op0, Ty, IC, CxtI) &&
+           canEvaluateTruncatedImpl(Op1, Ty, IC, CxtI);
+  }
   default:
     // TODO: Can handle more cases here.
     break;
diff --git a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/trunc-minmax-intrinsics.ll b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/trunc-minmax-intrinsics.ll
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000..8a2d38fb85bc3
--- /dev/null
+++ b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/trunc-minmax-intrinsics.ll
@@ -0,0 +1,623 @@
+; NOTE: Assertions have been autogenerated by utils/update_test_checks.py UTC_ARGS: --version 6
+; RUN: opt -passes=instcombine %s -S | FileCheck %s
+
+declare void @use_i32(i32)
+
+define i8 @umin_mul3_clamp(i8 %x) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define i8 @umin_mul3_clamp(
+; CHECK-SAME: i8 [[X:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[Z:%.*]] = zext i8 [[X]] to i16
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[M:%.*]] = mul nuw nsw i16 [[Z]], 3
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[U:%.*]] = call i16 @llvm.umin.i16(i16 [[M]], i16 255)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[T:%.*]] = trunc nuw i16 [[U]] to i8
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[T]]
+;
+  %z = zext i8 %x to i32
+  %m = mul nuw nsw i32 %z, 3
+  %u = call i32 @llvm.umin.i32(i32 %m, i32 255)
+  %t = trunc i32 %u to i8
+  ret i8 %t
+}
+
+define i8 @umin_add_two_zexts(i8 %x, i8 %y) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define i8 @umin_add_two_zexts(
+; CHECK-SAME: i8 [[X:%.*]], i8 [[Y:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ZX:%.*]] = zext i8 [[X]] to i16
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ZY:%.*]] = zext i8 [[Y]] to i16
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ADD:%.*]] = add nuw nsw i16 [[ZX]], [[ZY]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[U:%.*]] = call i16 @llvm.umin.i16(i16 [[ADD]], i16 200)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[T:%.*]] = trunc nuw i16 [[U]] to i8
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[T]]
+;
+  %zx = zext i8 %x to i32
+  %zy = zext i8 %y to i32
+  %add = add nuw i32 %zx, %zy
+  %u = call i32 @llvm.umin.i32(i32 %add, i32 200)
+  %t = trunc i32 %u to i8
+  ret i8 %t
+}
+
+define i8 @umax_add_two_zexts(i8 %x, i8 %y) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define i8 @umax_add_two_zexts(
+; CHECK-SAME: i8 [[X:%.*]], i8 [[Y:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ZX:%.*]] = zext i8 [[X]] to i16
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ZY:%.*]] = zext i8 [[Y]] to i16
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ADD:%.*]] = add nuw nsw i16 [[ZX]], [[ZY]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[U:%.*]] = call i16 @llvm.umax.i16(i16 [[ADD]], i16 50)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[T:%.*]] = trunc i16 [[U]] to i8
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[T]]
+;
+  %zx = zext i8 %x to i32
+  %zy = zext i8 %y to i32
+  %add = add nuw i32 %zx, %zy
+  %u = call i32 @llvm.umax.i32(i32 %add, i32 50)
+  %t = trunc i32 %u to i8
+  ret i8 %t
+}
+
+define i8 @umin_of_umax_chain(i8 %x) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define i8 @umin_of_umax_chain(
+; CHECK-SAME: i8 [[X:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = call i8 @llvm.umax.i8(i8 [[X]], i8 10)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP2:%.*]] = call i8 @llvm.umin.i8(i8 [[TMP1]], i8 -56)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[TMP2]]
+;
+  %z = zext i8 %x to i32
+  %u1 = call i32 @llvm.umax.i32(i32 %z, i32 10)
+  %u2 = call i32 @llvm.umin.i32(i32 %u1, i32 200)
+  %t = trunc i32 %u2 to i8
+  ret i8 %t
+}
+
+define i8 @umax_boundary_max(i8 %x) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define i8 @umax_boundary_max(
+; CHECK-SAME: i8 [[X:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 -1
+;
+  %z = zext i8 %x to i32
+  %u = call i32 @llvm.umax.i32(i32 %z, i32 255)
+  %t = trunc i32 %u to i8
+  ret i8 %t
+}
+
+define i8 @umin_mul_two_zexts_too_wide(i8 %x, i8 %y) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define i8 @umin_mul_two_zexts_too_wide(
+; CHECK-SAME: i8 [[X:%.*]], i8 [[Y:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ZX:%.*]] = zext i8 [[X]] to i16
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ZY:%.*]] = zext i8 [[Y]] to i16
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[M:%.*]] = mul nuw i16 [[ZX]], [[ZY]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[U:%.*]] = call i16 @llvm.umin.i16(i16 [[M]], i16 200)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[T:%.*]] = trunc nuw i16 [[U]] to i8
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[T]]
+;
+  %zx = zext i8 %x to i32
+  %zy = zext i8 %y to i32
+  %m = mul nuw nsw i32 %zx, %zy
+  %u = call i32 @llvm.umin.i32(i32 %m, i32 200)
+  %t = trunc i32 %u to i8
+  ret i8 %t
+}
+
+define i8 @umin_unknown_operand(i32 %x) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define i8 @umin_unknown_operand(
+; CHECK-SAME: i32 [[X:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[U:%.*]] = call i32 @llvm.umin.i32(i32 [[X]], i32 100)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[T:%.*]] = trunc nuw nsw i32 [[U]] to i8
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[T]]
+;
+  %u = call i32 @llvm.umin.i32(i32 %x, i32 100)
+  %t = trunc i32 %u to i8
+  ret i8 %t
+}
+
+; Constant 256 has bit 8 set, so it does not fit in the i8 narrow type.
+; Narrowing to i16 should still succeed because both operands fit there.
+define i8 @umin_const_above_i8_max(i8 %x) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define i8 @umin_const_above_i8_max(
+; CHECK-SAME: i8 [[X:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[Z:%.*]] = zext i8 [[X]] to i16
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[M:%.*]] = mul nuw nsw i16 [[Z]], 3
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[U:%.*]] = call i16 @llvm.umin.i16(i16 [[M]], i16 256)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[T:%.*]] = trunc i16 [[U]] to i8
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[T]]
+;
+  %z = zext i8 %x to i32
+  %m = mul nuw nsw i32 %z, 3
+  %u = call i32 @llvm.umin.i32(i32 %m, i32 256)
+  %t = trunc i32 %u to i8
+  ret i8 %t
+}
+
+; Constant 65536 has bit 16 set, so it does not fit in i8 nor i16. The
+; %a operand can also exceed 65535, so the umin does not simplify away
+; and the narrowing must be skipped at every width.
+define i8 @umin_const_above_i16_max(i32 %y) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define i8 @umin_const_above_i16_max(
+; CHECK-SAME: i32 [[Y:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[A:%.*]] = and i32 [[Y]], 131071
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[U:%.*]] = call i32 @llvm.umin.i32(i32 [[A]], i32 65536)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[T:%.*]] = trunc i32 [[U]] to i8
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[T]]
+;
+  %a = and i32 %y, 131071
+  %u = call i32 @llvm.umin.i32(i32 %a, i32 65536)
+  %t = trunc i32 %u to i8
+  ret i8 %t
+}
+
+; Constant 200 is positive but outside signed i8 range [-128, 127], so it
+; does not have enough sign bits for the i8 narrowing.
+define i8 @smax_const_above_i8_smax(i8 %x, i8 %y) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define i8 @smax_const_above_i8_smax(
+; CHECK-SAME: i8 [[X:%.*]], i8 [[Y:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SX:%.*]] = sext i8 [[X]] to i16
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SY:%.*]] = sext i8 [[Y]] to i16
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ADD:%.*]] = add nsw i16 [[SX]], [[SY]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[U:%.*]] = call i16 @llvm.smax.i16(i16 [[ADD]], i16 200)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[T:%.*]] = trunc i16 [[U]] to i8
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[T]]
+;
+  %sx = sext i8 %x to i32
+  %sy = sext i8 %y to i32
+  %add = add nsw i32 %sx, %sy
+  %u = call i32 @llvm.smax.i32(i32 %add, i32 200)
+  %t = trunc i32 %u to i8
+  ret i8 %t
+}
+
+; Constant -200 is negative but outside signed i8 range [-128, 127].
+define i8 @smin_const_below_i8_smin(i8 %x, i8 %y) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define i8 @smin_const_below_i8_smin(
+; CHECK-SAME: i8 [[X:%.*]], i8 [[Y:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SX:%.*]] = sext i8 [[X]] to i16
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SY:%.*]] = sext i8 [[Y]] to i16
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ADD:%.*]] = add nsw i16 [[SX]], [[SY]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[U:%.*]] = call i16 @llvm.smin.i16(i16 [[ADD]], i16 -200)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[T:%.*]] = trunc i16 [[U]] to i8
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[T]]
+;
+  %sx = sext i8 %x to i32
+  %sy = sext i8 %y to i32
+  %add = add nsw i32 %sx, %sy
+  %u = call i32 @llvm.smin.i32(i32 %add, i32 -200)
+  %t = trunc i32 %u to i8
+  ret i8 %t
+}
+
+define i8 @umin_chain_multi_use(i8 %x) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define i8 @umin_chain_multi_use(
+; CHECK-SAME: i8 [[X:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[Z:%.*]] = zext i8 [[X]] to i32

+; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @use_i32(i32 [[U]])

+
+declare void @use_i8(i8)
+
+define i8 @umin_trunc_multi_use(i8 %x) {

+define i8 @umin_asymmetric(i8 %x, i32 %y) {
``````````
